name: Путь Дикой Магии
description: Many places in the multiverse abound with beauty, intense emotion, and rampant magic; the Feywild, the Upper Planes, and other realms of supernatural power radiate with such forces and can profoundly influence people. As folk of deep feeling, barbarians are especially susceptible to these wild influences, with some barbarians being transformed by the magic.
note: This subclass is from a different game edition. For a given subclass feature, you may gain that feature at a different level from the one specified in the subclass feature.
